accurate.why: Accurately states the operative directive to remove US forces from hostilities with Iran absent a declaration of war/AUMF, and the self-defense rule of construction.

states_purpose.why: States the core War Powers directive.

changes_to_existing_law.why: A War Powers directive, not an amendment to standing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the rule of construction preserving self-defense.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the removal directive and principal carve-out; findings are non-operative context.

correct_entities.why: Iran and US Armed Forces correctly identified.
